label: AssemblyAI
description: Transcribe audio and extract intelligence from speech using AssemblyAI's API.

form.title: Connect AssemblyAI
form.subtitle: Paste your AssemblyAI API key to enable speech-to-text and audio intelligence.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your AssemblyAI API key. Quickest setup — find it in your account dashboard under API Keys.
methods.how_to:
## Get your AssemblyAI API Key

1. Sign in at [app.assemblyai.com](https://www.assemblyai.com/app).
2. Click your account avatar or name in the top-right corner.
3. Navigate to **Account → API Keys**.
4. Copy the key shown (it starts with a long alphanumeric string).
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Your API key grants full access to your AssemblyAI account, including all transcription jobs and usage. Keep it secret.
- If you suspect the key has been compromised, regenerate it from the same **API Keys** page — any integration using the old key will need to be updated.
- Usage charges apply per audio minute transcribed; check your plan limits on the [Billing page](https://www.assemblyai.com/app/account/billing).

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at app.assemblyai.com → Account → API Keys. Treat this like a password — it grants full API access.
